LightningComponentBundle.description: AI-powered conversational insights grounded in live Salesforce record data. Drop on any record page or app page.

property.name: defaultDepth
property.label: Default Relationship Depth
property.description: Sets the starting relationship depth for insights mode.

property.name: maxDepthAllowed
property.label: Maximum Relationship Depth
property.description: Limits the highest depth users can select in insights mode.

property.name: defaultFieldCategoriesCsv
property.label: Default Field Categories (CSV)
property.description: Optional comma-separated category API names to include by default, for example: core,status,financial.

property.name: defaultRelationshipsCsv
property.label: Default Relationships (CSV)
property.description: Optional comma-separated relationship API names to include by default.

property.name: defaultModelApiName
property.label: Default Model API Name
property.description: Optional model API name to preselect when it is available.

property.name: persistConversation
property.label: Persist Conversation
property.description: Stores conversation history and usage metrics in browser local storage.

property.name: enableSuggestedFollowUps
property.label: Enable Suggested Follow-Ups
property.description: Generates suggested follow-up questions after each response. This makes an additional AI call and typically consumes about 2 extra flex credits per message turn.

property.name: defaultDepth
property.label: Default Relationship Depth
property.description: Sets the starting relationship depth for insights mode.

property.name: maxDepthAllowed
property.label: Maximum Relationship Depth
property.description: Limits the highest depth users can select in insights mode.

property.name: defaultFieldCategoriesCsv
property.label: Default Field Categories (CSV)
property.description: Optional comma-separated category API names to include by default, for example: core,status,financial.

property.name: defaultRelationshipsCsv
property.label: Default Relationships (CSV)
property.description: Optional comma-separated relationship API names to include by default.

property.name: defaultModelApiName
property.label: Default Model API Name
property.description: Optional model API name to preselect when it is available.

property.name: persistConversation
property.label: Persist Conversation
property.description: Stores conversation history and usage metrics in browser local storage.

property.name: enableSuggestedFollowUps
property.label: Enable Suggested Follow-Ups
property.description: Generates suggested follow-up questions after each response. This makes an additional AI call and typically consumes about 2 extra flex credits per message turn.
